issues_found: Source type is navigation_page - per Core Rules, navigation pages must be rejected
Missing published_at date - cannot verify recency or establish archival timestamp
Source is a program landing page containing links to sub-pages (final rule, FAQs, submission instructions) rather than substantive content
Page contains no specific market catalyst event - only program overview and navigation links
Summary and key_points are factually accurate but describe the program generally, not a discrete actionable event
Source has informational quality tier (4/10) - thin signal for archiving purposes
human_review_reason: Clear-cut reject based on navigation_page source type. Core Rule 5 explicitly states navigation pages must be rejected regardless of content accuracy. The program's historical significance (established August 2023, effective January 2025) does not elevate this specific informational page to archivable status.
